name: German Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2 In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, yogurt, and egg; beat until smooth.
3 Drop teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto a greased baking sheet.
4 Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until bottoms are lightly browned.
5 Transfer cookies to a wire rack. Allow to cool slightly before icing with warm frosting.
6 Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
